title: Falco Rule Schema & Composition
description:
## Falco Rule Schema & Composition

Falco rules are defined in YAML files and dictate what system activities should trigger alerts.

Which of the following describes the correct set of required fields for a complete, standalone Falco rule definition?

Choose the correct option:
explanation: A complete Falco rule must specify the following key fields: 'rule' (a unique name), 'condition' (the filtering expression), 'output' (the formatted alert message), 'priority' (syslog priority level), and 'desc' (a description of what the rule detects).

hints.title: Falco Rule Anatomy Docs
hints.body: Rules files consist of rules, macros, and lists. Standalone rules require rule, desc, condition, output, and priority.
